TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $8,995.80 PRINCIPAL, $1,243.65 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,239.45, JUDGMENT FOR PLTF. JAMES L RAWLS - $7,878.80 JUDGMENT FOR PLTF. LENA RAWL - 1,117.00 TOTAL: $8995.80. PLUS COSTS AS PER COST BILL. SEE JUDGMENT FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
